initiatives.name: ReRev Labs Consulting Pipeline
initiatives.goal: Build a consistent inbound pipeline for AI consulting engagements. Target: 2-3 active clients at any given time generating $3K-$10K/month in retainer or project revenue.
initiatives.core_question: What is the fastest path from warm contact to signed consulting engagement, and how do we systematize it?
initiatives.notes: Primary revenue engine for ReRev Labs. Focus outreach on small business owners and founders who have already expressed interest in AI but haven't operationalized it.

initiatives.name: Workshop Distribution
initiatives.goal: Get ReRev Labs AI workshops into corporate, university, and accelerator calendars. Target: 1 paid workshop per month by end of Q2 2026.
initiatives.core_question: Who are the 10 buyers who could say yes in the next 60 days, and what do they need to see first?
initiatives.notes: Workshop product is ready. The constraint is distribution. Referral partners (accelerators, incubators, HBCUs) are faster than direct outreach to HR buyers.

initiatives.name: Speaking Circuit 2026
initiatives.goal: Secure 6-8 speaking engagements in 2026. Mix of paid keynotes, panels, and ecosystem stages. Build email list and inbound pipeline through stage visibility.
initiatives.core_question: What is the one talk that positions Keyona as the humanist AI voice that conference organizers can't find anywhere else?
initiatives.notes: Keyona's humanist + AI angle is genuinely differentiated. The constraint is proactive pitching — most bookings require a speaker kit and a targeted pitch, not just a LinkedIn bio.

initiatives.name: ReRev Labs Content Engine
initiatives.goal: Establish a lightweight content cadence that builds authority without becoming a full-time content job. Focus on LinkedIn and email newsletter as the two channels.
initiatives.core_question: What content can Keyona produce in 2 hours per week that builds the ReRev Labs brand and generates inbound?
initiatives.notes: Content is currently ad hoc. The goal is a repeatable system: one LinkedIn post per week, one newsletter per month. Quality over volume.
